prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-wide photorealistic desert fantasy scene at golden-hour sunset: a regal Middle Eastern desert princess stands in the foreground slightly right of center on a high sand dune, facing the viewer, with long dark windblown hair and a deliberately featureless face obscured by a soft vertical brown rectangular blur. She wears a flowing translucent champagne-gold chiffon gown with long veil-like sleeves, layered fabric streaming dramatically to both sides in the wind, an ornate jeweled belt, multiple gold necklaces, bracelets, and dangling earrings. Behind her stretches an immense Sahara-like dune sea with crisp rippled sand, deep shadows, footprints, and warm orange light from a low sun near the upper right horizon. Include exactly 4 major background landmarks: a carved ancient stone arch standing alone in the middle-left dunes, a distant rocky mesa on the far left, small adobe desert buildings on the right horizon, and hazy rock formations near the sun. Add exactly 2 camel-caravan groups on the right: an upper distant line of 9 camel-and-rider silhouettes crossing a ridge, and a lower nearer group of 7 camels with riders plus 1 walking guide in a white robe holding a staff. Use dramatic backlighting, long shadows, atmospheric haze, high detail, epic travel-poster composition, warm amber and bronze color grading, 16:9 aspect ratio, no text, no watermark.
